items.caption: A red plastic case with various tools and a cd. the tools appear to be a set of lockpicking devices, including picks and tension wrenches. there is also a manual or instruction booklet in the case, which is partially visible. the cd has chinese text on it, suggesting that the kit may be intended for a chinese-speaking audience or that the instructions are in chinese. the case is placed on a wooden surface, and the background is neutral, focusing attention on the contents of the case.
